title: KISS zero-length frames never dispatched
description: lichen/subsys/lichen/transport/kiss_transport.c:91 + lichen/tests/kiss_transport/src/main.c:300-318. spec/kiss-framing.md §1.1 defines DATA as 0-N bytes and §4.3 requires Return (0x0F, no payload) be accepted silently. Code requires ctx->len > 0 to complete a frame, so a cmd-only frame is never dispatched and the Return path can never execute. The test test_decode_cmd_only enshrines the deviation with a false 'per spec' comment — spec says no such thing. Fix: complete frames on in_frame && has_cmd regardless of len; fix test and comment.
